info.title: CallCaster API
info.description: User-facing HTTP API for CallCaster: control workspaces, campaigns, contacts, audiences, scripts, dialer/call-screen flows, and messaging. Authenticate with a browser session cookie (signed-in user) or workspace API key (automation). Webhooks, internal telephony workers, and undocumented security gaps are in the complete surface spec at /api/docs/openapi/all.

tags.name: Integrator API
tags.description: Automation-friendly JSON endpoints (API key or session).

tags.description: Workspace settings, API keys, numbers, and admin.

post.summary: Create campaign with script and phone number (one-shot)
post.description: Creates a call campaign in a single request: optionally creates a script, creates the campaign with a caller ID, and attaches audiences (with optional contact enqueue). Provide exactly one of `script` or `script_id`, not both.

401.description: Unauthorized (missing or invalid session / API key)

403.description: Forbidden (e.g. workspace_id does not match API key)

post.description: Sends one outbound SMS to a phone number. When `contact_id` is provided, template tags in `body` are substituted from the contact record. Session auth requires `workspace_id` in the body.

post.summary: Dispatch SMS to queued campaign contacts
post.description: Legacy batch dispatch: sends SMS to all queued contacts on a message campaign. Processes template tags per contact. Duplicate sends to the same number are skipped and the queue row is dequeued. API key auth requires `user_id` for outreach attribution; session auth uses the logged-in user.

sessionCookie.name: sb-access-token
sessionCookie.description: Session cookie (browser). Use workspace API key for server/script access.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Workspace API key (prefix cc_). Alternatively: Authorization: Bearer <key>.

WorkspaceId.description: Required in the request body when using session auth. Optional with API key; must match the key workspace if provided.

CreateCampaignWithScriptRequest.description: Provide exactly one of `script` or `script_id` (XOR). Enforced in Zod validation, not in OpenAPI required fields.

caller_id.description: Outbound caller ID. Must be a workspace phone number (e.g. +15551234567).

script.description: Inline script to create and attach. Use this OR script_id.

type.description: script for live_call, ivr for IVR types. Defaults from campaign type.

script_id.description: ID of an existing script to attach. Use this OR script.

audience_ids.description: Audience IDs to attach (must belong to workspace).

enqueue_audience_contacts.description: If true, enqueue contacts from attached audiences; if false, only link audiences.

campaign.description: Created campaign row (id, title, workspace, type, caller_id, status, ...).

campaignDetails.description: Type-specific details (e.g. live_campaign/ivr_campaign) with campaign_id, script_id.

script.description: Present only when a script was created in this request.

contacts_enqueued.description: Total contacts added to the campaign queue.

ChatSmsRequest.description: Session auth requires workspace_id in the body.

contact_id.description: Optional contact ID for template tag substitution.

media.description: Optional media URL or path for MMS.

messaging_service_sid.description: Optional Twilio Messaging Service SID override.

CampaignSmsDispatchRequest.description: Session auth requires workspace_id. API key auth requires user_id for outreach attribution.

campaign_id.description: Message campaign ID whose queued contacts receive SMS.

caller_id.description: Outbound caller ID. Required when campaign sms_send_mode requires it.

user_id.description: Required when using API key auth (outreach attribution). Session auth uses the logged-in user.

responses.description: Per-contact send results keyed by contact_id (success, skipped, or error).
